stemHtml: An aircraft starts the take-off run but at 60 knots IAS, the pilot rejects the take-off. What shall the flight crew do next in respect to the brakes?

options.a: If the tires/wheels didn’t explode/ignite you can take-off immediately.
options.b: ATC needs to be asked for brake cooling before second take-off.
options.c: If the aircraft has carbon brakes, you can take-off immediately.
options.d: Calculate the time for brake cooling, wait as necessary and then take-off.
